summary: iOS | FOCUS 2 | Apps settings section is missing
scenario: "Apps" settings section missing from Device settings after pairing Voyager Focus 2 with Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
description_clean: On iOS, after pairing a Voyager Focus 2 headset with the Poly Studio Mobile app, the "Apps" settings section is missing from Device settings. According to the Focus 2 UI specs, the Apps section should be present with Amazon Alexa and Tile options.
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS device.
2. Pair a Voyager Focus 2 headset with the app.
4. Tap on the paired Voyager Focus 2 device name to open Device Settings.
5. Scroll through the Device Settings screen.
6. Look for the "Apps" section in the settings list.
expected: The "Apps" section should be present in Device Settings, containing Amazon Alexa and Tile options.
actual: The "Apps" section is missing from Device Settings. No Amazon Alexa or Tile options are visible.
